overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains an active presence across Mastodon, LinkedIn, and Bluesky, focusing on research, publications, and opportunities in computational social science and disinformation studies. LinkedIn has the largest follower base, while Bluesky shows strong engagement relative to its follower count.

contentThemes.description: Announcements of new papers, releases of tools, and discussions around methodological approaches to studying disinformation.
Posts about hiring postdoctoral researchers and research opportunities for PhD students in computational social science.
Mentions of upcoming presentations at conferences related to disinformation and computational methods.

recommendations: Increase cross-platform promotion to leverage larger audiences on LinkedIn to drive followers to Bluesky and Mastodon.
Experiment with different content formats (e.g., videos, infographics) to potentially increase engagement.
Run targeted polls or Q&A sessions to foster interaction and understand audience interests.

platformInsights.bluesky: Bluesky shows a high repost rate, suggesting content resonates with the audience and is considered shareable. Focus on continuing to share research findings and opportunities.
platformInsights.mastodon: Engagement on Mastodon is lower compared to other platforms. Experiment with more interactive content or engaging with relevant discussions within the Mastodon community.
platformInsights.linkedin: LinkedIn has the largest follower base and highest engagement. Continue sharing career-related announcements and grant information to maintain a professional presence.

topPerformingContent.content: Excited to announce that our research team has been awarded a new grant to study information operations across social media platforms.

Now hiring: Two postdoctoral researchers to join our team working on computational methods for social media analysis. Background in data science, computational social science, or related fields preferred.
Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
